displayNameZh: 三个面向拆解：Skill、工具、流程
summary: Yt Three Dimensions component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「三个面向拆解：Skill、工具、流程」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-three-dimensions/src/YtThreeDimensions.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtThreeDimensions` and `ytThreeDimensionsDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Three Dimensions Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-three-dimensions to my project. Preserve the exported YtThreeDimensionsProps API and register the YtThreeDimensions composition with the default props.
